question: Design a `Book` class with private attributes for `title`, `author`, and `isbn`. Implement a public constructor to initialize these attributes and a `displayDetails()` method to print all book information.

test_cases.expected:
Title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
Author: Douglas Adams
ISBN: 17
---
Title: 1984
Author: George Orwell
ISBN: 13

errors: The 'isbn' attribute is semantically designed incorrectly as an integer (`int isbn_numerical`) instead of a string (`std::string`). The constructor then assigns the length of the ISBN string to this integer, losing the actual ISBN data and violating the semantic meaning of an ISBN.
